projects.title: Matrimandir & I
projects.description: Matrimandir and I is a web series that interviews Aurovilians about their personal experiences with the Matrimandir - the Soul of Auroville. This human experiment explores how citizens relate to the Matrimandir as common ground for human unity, with the dream of interviewing all residents. The Matrimandir - the Temple of the Mother - stands as the central cohesive force of Auroville, a universal township dedicated to human unity in diversity and a living experiment in consciousness and sustainable living.

projects.title: Karsha Nuns Project
projects.description: Set in the remote Himalayan region of Zanskar in Ladakh, this documentary follows the lives of the Karsha nuns - women who live and practice in quiet devotion at one of the oldest nunneries in the region. Through intimate, observational footage, we witness their daily routines, rituals, and the profound stillness that defines their mountain existence. The film then follows an extraordinary journey as a group of 10 nuns leave their secluded village - many for the first time - and travel south to Auroville, an experimental international township in Tamil Nadu. Their presence in Auroville - with all its diversity, innovation, and spiritual experimentation - becomes a moment of deep contrast and connection. Through the eyes of the nuns, we see Auroville anew: their open-hearted curiosity, humble wonder, and quiet strength offer viewers a rare and touching lens through which to reflect on both traditions and the future. This documentary is more than a record - it is a bridge, a shared archive for both communities, and a celebration of mutual learning and human connection.

projects.title: Breaking the Silence
projects.description:
A film about truth, trauma and the possibility of healing. Breaking the Silence is a feature-length documentary currently in post-production. 

It began with one question:

What happens when the truth is never spoken?
This film explores the hidden reality of child sexual abuse — not through statistics alone, but through human stories, lived experiences, and the long journey toward healing.
Blending survivor testimonies, global expert insights, and deeply personal narration, the film moves beyond awareness… and into something more powerful:

• a space for truth
• a space for listening
• a space for healing
